raw_text: I ordered from the store for the first time, but the product arrived in poor condition (saffola gold was leaking). I sent photos, but it's been over 10 minutes, and I heaven't receive any reply or return. very disappointing experience.

app is good and items are reaching on time but unfortunately I ordered wrong size lunchbox recently and there is no option to return.even contacting the helpline they were not at all understanding.i know it's because of policy and handling many people.but not accepting return within 5 min is straight not expected

I ordered a Citizen Men's Rider Rain Suit from Blinkit, but received only the upper jacket. The lower pant was missing. Despite sharing photos and contacting customer support, my complaint was rejected without a proper resolution. Very disappointed with the service and customer support experience. blinkit support Upon reviewing your concern, we have received confirmation from the concerned team that the item was delivered in an intact and sealed condition, with no issues observed at the time o

FRAUD APP Very disappointed yesterday I ordered godrej aer matic machine n it showed delivered but it's not delivered n now they don't have customer care number where we can call.They are using only email n when I wrote to them couple of times they refuse to understand the issue n give any resolution.I will take legal action against this fraud app n will post this matter on all social media sites.

very bad experience, ordered to drinks that are supposed to be served chilled, but I got them at room temperature, texted help desk, i wanted a refund but they didn't gave me a choice but to replace the items, even the replaced items were not Cold not chilled, no customer care to call, no delivery help, and finally i ended up with room temperature drinks, never using blinkit again, ordered same products on Instamart and zepto got them chilled everytime, i will never order from blinkit again.

My Blinkit Money balance is showing, but whenever I try to place an order it says “This payment method is not available at the moment.” I have tried reinstalling app, clearing cache, waiting 3 days, and different orders. Please check my wallet/account and enable usage.

can't modify your order after it is placed very bad experience even help and support page is openly saying that they will not modify it and can't even cancel it . It was just after a minute I am trying to modify my order but they are not doing that . very bad experience as a user i suggest not to order from blinkit. If there is no option then go very safely with a final call because we do not want to waste our money just by one click
I have tried many delivery apps. I love your packaging and the fact that it always has new information. And its good to be able to avoid last minute panic most days.

Hello blinkit actually I have a problem regarding the payment methods of COD it is not working for 6 days and also I don't use any other payment methods to get my order so do something for it otherwise I can't order anything but a good thing is it is a very nice and reasonable app for using i liked it actually loved it very much and I can use everytime so that's all to say . But it's not working for 8 days and I can't use your app please do something I have something very important now please do

It's a very bad app don't use it they don't have any customer care number , you cannot cancel yourself if you place the wrong order or by mistake. Very bad I personally won't suggest GO FOR ALTERNATIVES 🙏

I am consistently impressed by Blinkit's grocery quality. Buying fresh produce online can be risky, but their fruits and vegetables are always premium and well-sorted. The app has an incredibly smooth interface, a massive product selection, and lightning-fast delivery. It saves me so much time and effort compared to navigating local markets!

I installed Blinkit for first time and learned my lesson hard way. Worst customer experience with no accountability. I am always a Big Basket user and never had a issue with them. first order, toothpaste pack of 2 has 1 missing tube and taped back. when I tried reaching Help centre they closed the issue twice with no response at all.

⭐ 1 Star Review "I purchased this charger because it was advertised as an 80W fast charger, but it does not provide fast charging on my phone. The product performance does not match the description. I feel like I wasted my money. Very disappointed with this purchase. Please provide accurate product information to customers." Short version: ⭐ 1 Star "Bought this charger expecting 80W fast charging, but it doesn't fast charge my phone at all. The product doe
Overall, the service is good, but one issue I’ve noticed is that whenever I order milk, it is often delivered close to its expiry date. I would appreciate it if fresher milk could be provided.

I have ordered Milky Mist Asal idli & Dosa Batter from Blink it where the price listed in site is Rs.95 and after received the product, the price in the product shown is Rs.65. Even in the invoice shows the price as Rs.95. They have refunded the amount as promocode which i tend to order a product again and redeem the code this app is useless and better to go with other apps like zepto or instamart. Going to uninstall it and won't be using it further

Blinkit is absolutely amazing! Their grocery delivery is incredibly reliable and lightning-fast. Whenever I need daily essentials, they arrive in minutes, making life so much easier. But what truly makes Blinkit stand out is their free ambulance service. It is a fantastic, life-saving initiative that shows they genuinely care about the community. It’s rare to see an app combine top-tier convenience with such meaningful social responsibility. Highly recommend this app for speed and heart!

Too much pricing and the order takes a whole lot of time to be delivered.. Recently, after confirming our order it took about 10 mins just to assign a delivery partner. The products are all fine however the service isn't great and the pricing seems unfair as they add surge charge and stuff. Once the product we ordered got sold whilst the ordering process..

Very Average service. Most of the time the app says currently not available & we can purchase only when they are available. We are like their paid beggars waiting for them to be available to avail their service. Insta & Flipkart are better compared to Blinkit.

actually everything is fine but the delivery charges are way too high for students😅🥲 but rest everything is fine andi loved it and also the app was easy to use and deliveries were on time and the products I got also were in good condition.... but delivery chages are not suitable for students...

repeatedly sending unsealed items and items without mention of expiry date and customer service takes 45 mins to complete conversation and arrange pick up/ refund. very often replacement is not available. frequency of spoiled / tampered goods has increased tremendously. there is some bad storage issue going on with blinkit.
